lines.english: Lesson 34
lines.chinese: 第34课
lines.raw: Lesson 34 | 第34课

lines.english: A happy discovery
lines.chinese: 幸福的发现
lines.raw: A happy discovery | 幸福的发现

lines.english: What was the 'happy discovery' ?
lines.chinese: 什么是“幸福的发现”？
lines.raw: What was the 'happy discovery' ? | 什么是“幸福的发现”？

lines.english: Antique shops exert a peculiar fascination on a great many people.
lines.chinese: 古玩店对许多人来说都有一种特殊的魅力。
lines.raw: Antique shops exert a peculiar fascination on a great many people. | 古玩店对许多人来说都有一种特殊的魅力。

lines.english: The more expensive kind of antique shop where rare objects are beautifully displayed in glass cases
lines.chinese: 那些高档古玩店，珍品都漂亮地陈列在玻璃柜里
lines.raw: The more expensive kind of antique shop where rare objects are beautifully displayed in glass cases | 那些高档古玩店，珍品都漂亮地陈列在玻璃柜里

lines.english: to keep them free from dust is usually a forbidding place.
lines.chinese: 以免沾染灰尘，通常是令人望而却步的地方。
lines.raw: to keep them free from dust is usually a forbidding place. | 以免沾染灰尘，通常是令人望而却步的地方。

lines.english: But no one has to muster up courage to enter a less pretentious antique shop.
lines.chinese: 但对于不那么做作的古玩店，人们无需鼓起勇气进去。
lines.raw: But no one has to muster up courage to enter a less pretentious antique shop. | 但对于不那么做作的古玩店，人们无需鼓起勇气进去。

lines.english: There is always hope that in its labyrinth of musty, dark, disordered rooms a real rarity will be found amongst the piles of assorted junk that litter the floors.
lines.chinese: 人们总是希望在那些发霉、阴暗、杂乱的房间构成的迷宫中，能在堆满地板的各式各样的旧货中找到一件真正的珍品。
lines.raw: There is always hope that in its labyrinth of musty, dark, disordered rooms a real rarity will be found amongst the piles of assorted junk that litter the floors. | 人们总是希望在那些发霉、阴暗、杂乱的房间构成的迷宫中，能在堆满地板的各式各样的旧货中找到一件真正的珍品。

lines.english: No one discovers a rarity by chance.
lines.chinese: 没有人会偶然发现珍品。
lines.raw: No one discovers a rarity by chance. | 没有人会偶然发现珍品。

lines.english: A truly dedicated bargain hunter must have patience,
lines.chinese: 一个真正专注的廉价商品搜寻者必须有耐心，
lines.raw: A truly dedicated bargain hunter must have patience, | 一个真正专注的廉价商品搜寻者必须有耐心，

lines.english: and above all, the ability to recognize the worth of something when he sees it.
lines.chinese: 最重要的是，当他看到一件东西时，要有识别其价值的能力。
lines.raw: and above all, the ability to recognize the worth of something when he sees it. | 最重要的是，当他看到一件东西时，要有识别其价值的能力。

lines.english: To do this, he must be at least as knowledgeable as the dealer.
lines.chinese: 为此，他必须至少和经销商一样知识渊博。
lines.raw: To do this, he must be at least as knowledgeable as the dealer. | 为此，他必须至少和经销商一样知识渊博。

lines.english: Like a scientist bent on making a discovery,
lines.chinese: 就像一个决心有所发现的科学家一样，
lines.raw: Like a scientist bent on making a discovery, | 就像一个决心有所发现的科学家一样，

lines.english: he must cherish the hope that one day he will be amply rewarded.
lines.chinese: 他必须怀揣希望，总有一天他会得到丰厚的回报。
lines.raw: he must cherish the hope that one day he will be amply rewarded. | 他必须怀揣希望，总有一天他会得到丰厚的回报。

lines.english: My old friend, Frank Halliday, is just such a person.
lines.chinese: 我的老朋友弗兰克·哈利迪就是这样一个人。
lines.raw: My old friend, Frank Halliday, is just such a person. | 我的老朋友弗兰克·哈利迪就是这样一个人。

lines.english: He has often described to me how he picked up a masterpiece for a mere ￡50.
lines.chinese: 他常常向我描述他是如何以区区50英镑买到一件杰作的。
lines.raw: He has often described to me how he picked up a masterpiece for a mere ￡50. | 他常常向我描述他是如何以区区50英镑买到一件杰作的。

lines.english: One Saturday morning, Frank visited an antique shop in my neighbourhood.
lines.chinese: 一个星期六的上午，弗兰克去了我附近的一家古玩店。
lines.raw: One Saturday morning, Frank visited an antique shop in my neighbourhood. | 一个星期六的上午，弗兰克去了我附近的一家古玩店。

lines.english: As he had never been there before, he found a great deal to interest him.
lines.chinese: 因为他以前从未来过这里，所以发现了很多让他感兴趣的东西。
lines.raw: As he had never been there before, he found a great deal to interest him. | 因为他以前从未来过这里，所以发现了很多让他感兴趣的东西。

lines.english: The morning passed rapidly and Frank was about to leave when he noticed a large packing case lying on the floor.
lines.chinese: 上午很快过去了，弗兰克正准备离开时，他注意到地板上放着一个大包装箱。
lines.raw: The morning passed rapidly and Frank was about to leave when he noticed a large packing case lying on the floor. | 上午很快过去了，弗兰克正准备离开时，他注意到地板上放着一个大包装箱。

lines.english: The dealer told him that it had just come in, but that he could not be bothered to open it.
lines.chinese: 经销商告诉他，这东西刚到，但他懒得打开。
lines.raw: The dealer told him that it had just come in, but that he could not be bothered to open it. | 经销商告诉他，这东西刚到，但他懒得打开。

lines.english: Frank begged him to do so and the dealer reluctantly prised it open.
lines.chinese: 弗兰克恳求他打开，经销商不情愿地撬开了箱子。
lines.raw: Frank begged him to do so and the dealer reluctantly prised it open. | 弗兰克恳求他打开，经销商不情愿地撬开了箱子。

lines.english: The contents were disappointing.
lines.chinese: 里面的东西令人失望。
lines.raw: The contents were disappointing. | 里面的东西令人失望。

lines.english: Apart from an interesting-looking carved dagger, the box was full of crockery, much of it broken.
lines.chinese: 除了一个看起来有趣的雕花匕首外，箱子里装满了陶器，其中大部分都碎了。
lines.raw: Apart from an interesting-looking carved dagger, the box was full of crockery, much of it broken. | 除了一个看起来有趣的雕花匕首外，箱子里装满了陶器，其中大部分都碎了。

lines.english: Frank gently lifted the crockery out of the box and suddenly noticed a miniature painting at the bottom of the packing case.
lines.chinese: 弗兰克轻轻地把陶器从箱子里拿出来，突然注意到包装箱底部有一幅微型画。
lines.raw: Frank gently lifted the crockery out of the box and suddenly noticed a miniature painting at the bottom of the packing case. | 弗兰克轻轻地把陶器从箱子里拿出来，突然注意到包装箱底部有一幅微型画。

lines.english: As its composition and line reminded him of an Italian painting he knew well, he decided to buy it.
lines.chinese: 由于它的构图和线条让他想起了他很熟悉的一幅意大利画作，他决定买下它。
lines.raw: As its composition and line reminded him of an Italian painting he knew well, he decided to buy it. | 由于它的构图和线条让他想起了他很熟悉的一幅意大利画作，他决定买下它。

lines.english: Glancing at it briefly the dealer told him that it was worth ￡50.
lines.chinese: 经销商匆匆看了一眼，告诉他这幅画值50英镑。
lines.raw: Glancing at it briefly the dealer told him that it was worth ￡50. | 经销商匆匆看了一眼，告诉他这幅画值50英镑。

lines.english: Frank could hardly conceal his excitement, for he knew that he had made a real discovery.
lines.chinese: 弗兰克几乎无法掩饰他的兴奋，因为他知道他做了一个真正的发现。
lines.raw: Frank could hardly conceal his excitement, for he knew that he had made a real discovery. | 弗兰克几乎无法掩饰他的兴奋，因为他知道他做了一个真正的发现。

lines.english: The tiny painting proved to be an unknown masterpiece by Correggio and was worth hundreds and thousands of pounds.
lines.chinese: 这幅小画被证实是科雷吉奥的一幅不为人知的杰作，价值数十万英镑。
lines.raw: The tiny painting proved to be an unknown masterpiece by Correggio and was worth hundreds and thousands of pounds. | 这幅小画被证实是科雷吉奥的一幅不为人知的杰作，价值数十万英镑。
